title: astelia psychrocharis
intro: Astelia psychrocharis, also known as Astelia, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astelia include its ability to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its potential to aid in the management of type 2 diabetes. Astelia can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
